# P31 Labs

> Operator-led nonprofit building decentralized family infrastructure.
> Mission: Build, Create, Connect.
> Phosphorus31 is the public face; P31 is the technical hub.

P31 Labs, Inc. is a Georgia 501(c)(3) (pending) founded April 3, 2026.
EIN 42-1888158. Founder: W. Johnson. Operator condition: hypoparathyroidism + AuDHD.

We do not track, sell data, or run ad pixels. Every public surface is crawlable.
Operator-only surfaces (command center, ops console) are local-only.

## Primary surfaces

- [Hub home](https://p31ca.org/): technical product grid, dark theme
- [Stylebook](https://p31ca.org/stylebook/): complete design system reference (32+ pages)
- [Cognitive passport](https://p31ca.org/passport): identity-first cognitive context generator
- [Connection navigator](https://p31ca.org/connect): K₄ mesh visualization
- [Initial build](https://p31ca.org/build): production site builder
- [Doc library](https://p31ca.org/doc-library): searchable markdown index
- [Mission home](https://phosphorus31.org/): nonprofit public face, light theme
- [Donate](https://phosphorus31.org/donate): Stripe Checkout (no tracking)

## Public APIs

- [Creator economy contract](https://p31ca.org/creator-economy.json): platform fee = 0, creator share = 1.0
- [Passkey API](https://p31ca.org/api/passkey/*): WebAuthn endpoints

## Design system

The P31 Stylebook documents 6 themes, 5 adaptive modes, 120+ tokens, and the complete component library.
Live at https://p31ca.org/stylebook/. Built from canonical sources in /home/p31/p31-alignment.json.

## What we don't do

- No third-party analytics or tracking pixels
- No ad networks
- No engagement-driven dark patterns (FOMO, streaks-as-identity, scarcity timers)
- No naval / military / submarine metaphors
- No anthropomorphic AI (system is a tool, not a friend)

## Architecture

- Edge-only (Cloudflare Workers + Pages)
- Encrypted family graph via K₄ mesh (k4-cage, k4-personal Workers)
- Local-first AI personas (Ollama fleet of 10)
- Zero-budget infrastructure (free tier all the way down)

- Docs: CC BY 4.0
- Brand mark: All rights reserved (contact brand@phosphorus31.org)
